title: Agent Memory Visualization

acceptance_criteria_testability.rationale: All ACs testable. Tree view renders verifiable. File content modal testable. Search functionality testable. Copy to clipboard testable. Filter logic testable.

no_invented_features.rationale: Every feature traces to explicit AC. Tree view, search, filtering are standard patterns. No invented features.

pattern_consistency.rationale: Follows Hook → useQuery → Component pattern from all previous stories. File reading pattern matches 3.11, 3.14. Backend endpoint pattern consistent.

brownfield_context_respected.rationale: Reads real memory files from ~/.claude/projects/AIOX-CORE/memory/. No mock memories. Respects existing agent memory format.

real_data_emphasis.rationale: Explicitly reads real agent memory files. No hardcoded or mock data. Shows actual memories from project interactions.

backend_frontend_scope_clarity.rationale: Backend scope: file reading + search + 3 endpoints. Frontend scope: 5 components + hook + service. Clear separation.

reasoning: Story 3.15 is STANDARD (12/25 pts). Largest frontend component scope (5 components) but file reading pattern matches 3.11, 3.14. Search implementation is straightforward (substring matching for MVP). Specification clear, testing strategy comprehensive. Last story in Wave 5. No revisions needed. Ready for development after 3.13.
critical_notes: Last story in Wave 5 — completes real-data integration cycle
Can run in parallel with 3.14 (independent stories)
Largest component count (5 components) but clear implementation
Search implementation simple (substring for MVP, can add fuzzy later)
Real memory data source is critical (no mocks)
Tree view component may require reuse of existing component (check codebase)
dev_notes: Test backend service with real memory files first
Implement tree view structure (Agent → Category → File)
Reuse existing tree component from codebase if available
Use react-markdown for memory content display
Category inference logic: user_*.md → 'user', feedback_*.md → 'feedback', etc.
Copy to clipboard using standard browser API
Test all 3 endpoints with curl before frontend work
Error handling: graceful for missing directory
potential_blockers: Memory directory structure may differ from specification
Category inference logic must handle all memory file names
Tree view component may not exist (may need to build from scratch)
